title: hieracium levicaule subsp. percissiforme
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. percissiforme, commonly known as a type of Hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, with potential benefits for skin conditions and wound healing. The plant's medicinal properties may also contribute to its use in treating fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Hieracium levicaule subsp. percissiforme can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is necessary to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
